The order
[56]   As a result, I order that the defendant make the following payments to the plaintiff:
Four Hundred and Seventy Thousand Maloti (M470,000.00) for insurance claim.
One thousand Maloti (M1000.00) for airtime as appears in the Insurance Contract.
Interest on the total amount at the rate of 10.5% per annum.
Costs of suit at the ordinary scale.
